basic_details.job_title: MAHATRANSCO ITI (Electrician) Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 36 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MAHATRANSCO)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MAHATRANSCO) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for ITI (Electrician) Apprentice posts! Published at MAHATRANSCO Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 36 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of 18 to 30 years (with 5 years relaxation for OBC/SC/ST categories) and possessing 10th pass with two-year ITI (Electrician) certificate from a recognized industrial training institute can apply online from 11-05-2026 to 15-05-2026. Find all details about the MAHATRANSCO ITI (Electrician) App

age_limit.age_details: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 30 years (5 years relaxation for reserved categories)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for OBC, SC, and ST categories.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th pass and ITI (Electrician) with two years duration from a recognized industrial training institute.
qualification.details: 10th pass mark sheet Two years ITI (Electrician) certificate with all semester mark sheets from a recognized industrial training institute

salary_details.details: Stipend as per Government and Company rules.

selection_process: Document verification Selection will be communicated via email
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MAHATRANSCO ITI (Electrician) Apprentice Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MAHATRANSCO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MAHATRANSCO ITI (Electrician) Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the MAHATRANSCO ITI (Electrician) Apprentice posts is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the ITI (Electrician) Apprentice post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the ITI (Electrician) Apprentice post is 18 years. Candidates must have attained this age by the application deadline.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for candidates belonging to reserved categories such as OBC, SC, and ST.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for this apprenticeship?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th standard and possess a two-year ITI certificate in Electrician trade from a recognized industrial training institute.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the MAHATRANSCO ITI (Electrician) Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: You need to register on www.apprenticeshipindia.org and then apply online through the provided link using the Establishment Code – E06212700049.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 36 vacancies announced for the ITI (Electrician) Apprentice positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves document verification. Successful candidates will be communicated via email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the stipend offered for this apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The stipend for the ITI (Electrician) Apprentice will be as per the rules and regulations set by the Government and the Company.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. Does MAHATRANSCO offer any other apprentice positions?
faq.answer: This specific notification is for ITI (Electrician) Apprentice posts. For other opportunities, please refer to the official MAHATRANSCO website.
